name: Stack & Sort Toy - 66pcs - Gigglescape™: Stainless Steel & Wood, Baby & Toddler Learning, Developmental Toys
description:
The Stack & Sort Toy from Gigglescape™ gives your child a fun way to learn their letters, colors and numbers and develop problem-solving and fine motor skills. This set includes a wooden base, 55 wooden disks and 10 character blocks and incorporates animals, colors and patterns. Plus, the brightly colored rings make counting fun and interactive.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
